error_signature: content scrolls sideways instead of vertically
title: Content scrolling sideways instead of vertically
symptom: The content overflows the visible area and scrolls horizontally instead of vertically, making it difficult to view all content.
applies_when: CSS overflow property is set incorrectly
not_this_if: Content fits within the visible area
root_cause: The CSS overflow property was not set correctly, causing the content to scroll horizontally instead of vertically. This often happens when the overflow settings are applied to the wrong container.
fix_steps: Identify the correct container for the content
Set the CSS rule 'overflow-x: hidden;' on that container
Ensure the overflow property for vertical scrolling is set to 'auto' or 'visible'
agent_instruction: Apply 'overflow-x: hidden;' to the correct container to enable vertical scrolling.
